_class_details: Note various units for different items.
This class is for non-operated equipment with daily rates.
The allowance is entered on the extra work bill by using the unit listed multiplied by number of days in the hours worked column.
This list is limited to items with long estimated lives.
Additional traffic related items such as cones and barricades are listed under the TRAFC class.
Other non-operated items with short estimated lives should be treated as materials and should not be rented.
Non-rented items are 1) intended to be job specific (amortized over the life of the project) and 2) have an estimated life measured by number of uses rather than a length of time.

0370: This model is a metal form for a cast-in-place installation of Caltrans Type 50 Concrete Barrrier
0660: This model is a wood form for a cast-in-place installation of Caltrans Type 27 Concrete Barrrier
